T0037.title: Loan Processing
T0037.definition: The capability or channel to manage the entire credit application process within underground fraud operations.
T0037.description: In the context of credit fraud, the term refers not to a physical document but to an intermediary’s possession of the resources and methods to successfully secure a loan. Intermediaries package client profiles, clear approval hurdles, or exploit bank loopholes to complete the application. Having a direct line to the funding source or key approver means a higher success rate and steeper fees.
T0037.usageExample: I’ve got a solid direct line—blacklisted or clean file, doesn’t matter. As long as there’s no court enforcement, I can get it approved. Fee negotiable.
